chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1717 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No. 8532/2025 2. For order on office objection No.1 to 8 & 12 3. For orders on Misc. No. 8833/2025 4. For hearing of main case 02.05.2025 Mr. Sadaruddin Buriro, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 2-4. Petitioner seeks to assert contractual rights with respect to respondent / company that could not be demonstrated to be amenable to writ jurisdiction in the present circumstances. Even otherwise the only document demonstrating right to some request for approval, available at page 41, issued by the SSGC and even that is prima facie not in the name of any of 64 petitioners. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine along with pending application/s. Judge Judge Amjad
